@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-0134cc5a","title":"Fix auto-import creating duplicates instead of updating issues","description":"ROOT CAUSE: server_export_import_auto.go line 221 uses ResolveCollisions: true for ALL auto-imports. This is wrong.

Problem:
- ResolveCollisions is for branch merges (different issues with same ID)
- Auto-import should UPDATE existing issues, not create duplicates
- Every git pull creates NEW duplicate issues with different IDs
- Two agents ping-pong creating endless duplicates

Evidence:
- 31 duplicate groups found (bd duplicates)
- bd-236-246 are duplicates of bd-224-235
- Both agents keep pulling and creating more duplicates
- JSONL file grows endlessly with duplicates

The Fix:
Change checkAndAutoImportIfStale in server_export_import_auto.go:
- Remove ResolveCollisions: true (line 221)
- Use normal import logic that updates existing issues by ID
- Only use ResolveCollisions for explicit bd import --resolve-collisions

Impact: Critical - makes beads unusable for multi-agent workflows","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-10-27T21:48:57.733846-07:00","updated_at":"2025-10-30T17:12:58.21084-07:00","closed_at":"2025-10-27T22:26:40.627239-07:00"}
 {"id":"bd-02a4","title":"Modify CreateIssue to support parent resurrection","description":"Update internal/storage/sqlite/sqlite.go:182-196 to call TryResurrectParent before failing on missing parent. Coordinate with EnsureIDs changes for consistent behavior. Handle edge case where parent never existed in JSONL (fail gracefully).","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-04T12:31:59.701571-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-05T00:08:42.811436-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-05T00:08:42.81144-08:00"}

 {"id":"bd-03r","title":"Document deletions manifest in AGENTS.md and README","description":"Parent: bd-imj

## Task
Add documentation about the deletions manifest feature.

## Locations to Update

### AGENTS.md
- Explain that deletions.jsonl is tracked in git
- Document that `bd delete` records to the manifest
- Explain cross-clone propagation mechanism

### README.md  
- Brief mention in .beads directory structure section
- Link to detailed docs if needed

### docs/deletions.md (new file)
- Full technical documentation
- Format specification
- Pruning policy
- Git history fallback
- Troubleshooting

## Acceptance Criteria
- AGENTS.md updated with deletion workflow
- README.md mentions deletions.jsonl purpose
- New docs/deletions.md with complete reference","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-25T14:56:49.13027-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-25T15:17:23.145944-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-25T15:17:23.145944-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-03z45","title":"Review & merge PR #1019: feat(ui) Markdown in comments","description":"dispatched_by: beads/crew/emma

Review and merge PR #1019: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/1019

## Summary
Apply ui.RenderMarkdown() to comment text in bd show and bd comments commands. Enables syntax highlighting and code blocks in comments.

## Changes
- cmd/bd/comments.go - Use RenderMarkdown for comment text
- cmd/bd/show.go - Use RenderMarkdown for comment display (2 places)

## Review Checklist
- [ ] Pull the branch locally
- [ ] Run tests: go test ./...
- [ ] Test manually: create a comment with markdown, verify it renders
- [ ] Merge with gh pr merge 1019 --repo steveyegge/beads --squash","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/crew/giles","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-11T18:14:20.034175-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2026-01-11T18:17:39.763095-08:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T18:17:39.763095-08:00","close_reason":"PR #1019 reviewed, tested, and merged.
